title: Palicourea barraensis
taxonomy: Palicourea barraensis is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. This classification is based on its botanical characteristics and genetic relationships. The plant is further classified as belonging to the genus Palicourea, which is part of the tribe Palicoureeae. The Rubiaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as the coffee or madder family. The classification of Palicourea barraensis is essential for understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species.
uses: Palicourea barraensis is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, and its medicinal uses have been documented in traditional folk medicine.
